raw_consumer_statement:
ATTENTION : This is an ADDENDUM to COMPLAINT XXXX. This is NEW INFORMATION!!! BELOW SENT TO Barclays XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX EXECUTIVE on XX/XX/year> in re Case XXXX_Permanent Credit Required - In your quest to avoid taking care of your customer by moving goalposts, I am concerned that you may attempt another move / creation.

This would be your fourth attempt where you offered a requirement, I met it, and then you come up with a new requirement / goal to be met! To review, past goalposts that you established in writing and then after I fully met them, you moved them! : 1 ) Look, just send us a PoD and well get you that permanent credit! I did so and then later received this, 2 ) Yeah, well, that PoD was all well and good but you see uhhh, we really wanted a PoD where you used the Pre-Paid address label from the merchant. Thats it, pre-paid address label, yeah, thats the ticket. I explained to Monica on the phone that this new requirement / goalpost made no sense because it would have resulted in a PoD just like the one I submitted to you. The only real difference is that I would not have had to use my own money to return the merchandise.

3 ) Okay, that PoD you sent was fine but you returned the merchandise for a different order! Yeah, thats it! Thats the ticket! Different order. As I already explained to XXXX, that new goalpost also doesnt work. Heres why. The order in dispute is ORDER XXXX. This is verified by the order document itself which clearly shows the order number XXXX, {$240.00} and the email from the merchant stating ORDER XXXX no need to return the merchandise and that he was refunding my charge. You and XXXX have had these documents for some time. 

I do hope that you dont attempt to move/ create a goalpost for a fourth time! I would like to emphasize that your duty, your raison dtre is to PROTECT YOUR CUSTOMER. 

I look forward, at long last, to a permanent credit for {$240.00}.
